productDisplayName: Peter England Men Stripes Maroon Shirt
description: Composition Maroon and navy blue striped shirt made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar with a buttoned front placket, patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hem Fitting Nuvo Wash care Wash separately using a mild detergent Do not bleach Drip dry Warm iron Designed for the confident executive and crafted from soft cotton fabric, this striped formal shirt from peter england is stitched to perfection offering exemplary comfort. Pair it with crisp formals, a blazer, classy accessories and rich leather formal shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
